creator: miguel@anjos.strangled.net
text:
I only have the back panel plugs available. Line out and mic are OK but
the line in entrance is not working.

Looks like a routing problem. Looking at the verbose dmesg, it would
appear that nid 28 and 32 are the two line ins, and that 28 is selected.
Perhaps all that would be needed would be to have nid 32 selected.
Unfortunately, there seems to be no userland tweaking interface, through
sysctl or ioctl.

How-To-Repeat: 
Its systematic on this hardware.
